title: Baba O'Riley
meaning_summary: Baba O'Riley remains commercially useful because it is one of The Who's clearest catalog anchors for streaming, memory, and rediscovery.
revenue_drivers: Classic catalog streaming keeps the best-known songs active across generations.
Radio memory, playlists, and sync use support durable long-tail earnings.
Publishing and master rights can materially change the final artist-side share.

earnings.assumptions: Estimate keeps the headline range as the artist-side figure and models gross track, label, publishing, and songwriter lanes from that conservative annual range.

ownership.master_owner: Likely controlled through the recording label or distributor unless a specific rights sale is known
ownership.publishing_owner: Writer and publisher splits affect the publishing share shown here
ownership.catalog_sale_status: No specific catalog sale adjustment is modeled for this track
ownership.notes: Baba O'Riley is modeled from public-facing catalog behavior and conservative rights-split assumptions, not from audited royalty statements.
